name: io.github.lxxmng/container-tracking
description: Container tracking MCP: vessel positions, demurrage risk, port congestion for Claude & ChatGPT.

authentication.description: TrackingMCP API key — get one free at https://trackingmcp.com/mcp

tools.name: get_shipment_summary
tools.description: Portfolio overview: active containers, exceptions, arriving soon, demurrage risk

tools.name: get_container_detail
tools.description: Full status for one container: route, ETA, vessel, events, AI narrative

tools.name: get_vessel_position
tools.description: Live AIS position: lat/lng, speed, heading, nav status

tools.name: get_demurrage_report
tools.description: Demurrage risk: containers past free days, daily rates, projected cost

tools.name: get_port_congestion
tools.description: Port wait times and congestion level by UN/LOCODE

tools.name: add_container
tools.description: Start tracking a new container ID or B/L number
